creator: freebsd@shotmail.ru
text:
simply put I'm done.
I don't need sympathy, I don't need any reply with "Thank you for your efforts" just silently commit the removal.

csound

diakonos
fceux
bareftp
net2ftp
gnake
cacti
pidgin-otr
polarssl13
hiawatha

I would of created a patch but after 5 times trying to co the ports and getting time outs I just said bleh.
